message: fix(release): build tag on dispatch and switch macos runner

files.patch:
@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@ jobs:
             artifact: tru
             asset: tru-linux-arm64
             cross: true
-          - os: macos-13
+          - os: macos-15-intel
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
             artifact: tru
             asset: tru-darwin-amd64
@@ -57,6 +57,10 @@ jobs:
             cross: false
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5
+        with:
+          # When workflow_dispatch is used, build the requested tag while using
+          # the workflow file from the selected ref (typically master).
+          ref: ${{ inputs.tag || github.ref }}
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@f7ccc83f9ed1e5b9c81d8a67d7ad1a747e22a561
         with:
           toolchain: nightly
@@ -107,6 +111,8 @@ jobs:
       id-token: write
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5
+        with:
+          ref: ${{ inputs.tag || github.ref }}
       - uses: actions/download-artifact@d3f86a106a0bac45b974a628896c90dbdf5c8093
         with:
           path: dist
@@ -145,9 +151,12 @@ jobs:
     needs: release
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 15
-    if: ${{ !contains(github.ref, '-') }}
+    # Only publish crates when releasing from a tag push (never from workflow_dispatch).
+    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && !contains(github.ref, '-') }}
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5
+        with:
+          ref: ${{ inputs.tag || github.ref }}
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@f7ccc83f9ed1e5b9c81d8a67d7ad1a747e22a561
         with:
           toolchain: nightly
